## Source: amazon-inspector (f3605883655f4870250aaab1c630151c6264e54521d1a711a088871de1fe5ea5)
The package exprrrress was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (387d72a157f82d564aa36555abaa204465c769f4e5a5617458dc6bbc20f12b9a)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'exprrrress' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
